data.title: Test message from PR Newswire in Cleveland on Sept. 20, 2025, repeat: This is a test. This is a test. This is a test.
data.description: On September 20, 2025, in Cleveland, a test message was released by PR Newswire multiple times. The repetition of the message indicated a test communication being conducted for evaluation purposes. The information conveyed did not pertain to any specific news content but was a repetition of a test message. The test message did not include any significant details or numbers but was a routine check of the PR Newswire communication system. It was a part of standard procedures to ensure the effectiveness and functionality of the PR distribution service.

data.title: Billionaire Ray Dalio warns U.S. about $37.5 trillion debt crisis risk, expects no spending cuts despite concerns.
data.description: During the Future China Global Forum in Singapore, Ray Dalio, the founder of Bridgewater Associates, raised concerns about the U.S.'s massive $37.5 trillion debt, warning that it could lead to a potential crisis. The billionaire hedge fund manager has previously cautioned about the risk of a "debt-induced heart attack" in the near future. Despite increasing worries about fiscal sustainability, Dalio doesn't believe the U.S. will make significant spending cuts. He highlighted that due to various reasons, the U.S. cannot reduce its spending, which is setting a dangerous fiscal path. Notably, the 76-year-old billionaire attributed the debt issue to "human nature" rather than failures in policy from different political parties. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BitGo, with $90.3B in assets, files for US IPO, plans NYSE listing amidst rising institutional crypto adoption post new US policies.
data.description: BitGo, a company specializing in crypto custody services, has submitted paperwork to go public. They currently have $90.3 billion in assets under their custody. This move comes as institutional adoption of cryptocurrency is on the rise, especially with the implementation of new policies in the United States. BitGo is aiming to be listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) as part of this strategic expansion.

data.title: Over 1,000 flights disrupted at Dallas airports due to equipment outage, causing delays through Saturday.
data.description: An issue with telecommunications gear led to the need for authorities to restrict traffic flow at the main airports in the city, resulting in delays that persisted through Saturday.

data.title: New Pentagon rules require reporters to get formal authorization to gather/ use information; risking loss of credentials.
data.description: Reporters covering the military will be required by the Department of Defense to pledge not to collect or utilize any unauthorized information, failing which they may lose their military coverage credentials.
